title: The Digital Unveiling: Invoice Data Extraction
summary: This video captures the seamless process of logging into a data extraction platform, uploading a PDF invoice, and witnessing the automatic extraction of its key data into a newly created Excel spreadsheet, ready for meticulous review.

commentary.description: The user logs into the system, entering a username and password on the 'Welcome Back' screen.
commentary.narration: In the digital expanse, a user seeks passage through the portal. The ancient ritual of login commences, a gateway to the structured world of information. A username, a hidden password, keys to unlock the domain.

commentary.description: A security alert pops up, warning about a data breach related to the password, which the user acknowledges.
commentary.narration: Yet, even in this realm of order, echoes of the wider digital wilderness surface, a brief warning of compromised data, a reminder of the ever-present currents of the internet. With a click, the journey continues.

commentary.description: The user navigates to the 'Upload Invoice' section, selects a PDF file, names a new Excel sheet for extraction, and initiates the upload.
commentary.narration: Deep within the system, a central purpose reveals itself: the intricate art of invoice data extraction. A PDF document, 'Construction_Tax_Invoice_Sample (1).pdf,' is carefully chosen, its veiled data poised for revelation. A new digital repository, a 'new sheet,' is designated, a vessel to hold the emerging truths.

commentary.description: The system processes the PDF, extracts the data, and displays it in a structured format on the right side of the screen.
commentary.narration: As if by an unseen hand, the system begins its silent work. A processing bar charts its progress, 'Uploading & extracting,' a delicate transformation unfolding. Then, with an elegant flourish, the hidden details materialize. Invoice number, date, company details, a symphony of structured data, now visible, laid bare for observation.

commentary.description: The user navigates to 'View Excel' and previews the newly created spreadsheet containing the extracted invoice data.
commentary.narration: The journey culminates in a grand display. Navigating to 'View Excel,' our explorer witnesses the fruits of the system's labor: 'new_sheet.xlsx,' a meticulously organized table. The extracted data, now perfectly aligned within the columns and rows of a spreadsheet, an orderly record of the formerly elusive information, ready for profound analysis and archival.
